Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I'm glad you're feeling okay now. Well, I guess I'll head up first.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Like I said this morning, meet me on the fourth floor. The chairman should be waiting for us.[n]{f 1 1}
